meaning: n.智慧,明智的行为,学识,名言,贤人,至理名言
examples: They were godlike in their wisdom and compassion.
In this job you need to exhibit the wisdom of Solomon.
Despite conventional wisdom about the danger of shark attacks, diving with threshers is relatively safe.
We also talked with an icon of the civil rights generation for our Wisdom Watch conversation.
When building a company from the ground up, conventional wisdom says to always think long term.
